items.name: HYENA Modular Vest (Ranger Green)
items.description:
The HYENA vest system is built on top of old-world MOLLE plate carriers, allowing servicemembers to quickly don and doff the kit as necessary. Although it lacks the greater protection afforded by power armor, it’s well loved by the patrolmen of the Serengeti, who appreciate the protection it gives them relative to it’s light weight.
